data.title: Elon Musk's New X Post Sends Kekius Maximus Soaring 75%—Frog-Themed Pepe Also Rallies
data.description: Kekius Maximus (KEKIUS) meme coin woke up from slumber, skyrocketing over 70% Thursday, after tech mogul Elon Musk posted a photo referencing the cartoon character.

data.title: Tesla's Cybertruck Sales At Just 47K Is 'Really Bad' For 250K Target, Says Ross Gerber Amid Recall Troubles
data.description: Ross Gerber, CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management, highlighted Tesla Inc.'s struggling Cybertruck sales in a recent social media post, noting figures significantly below company projections.

data.title: Top 5 Trending Stocks: Nike, Quantum Computing, Fedex, D-Wave Quantum, And Tesla
data.description: U.S. stocks closed lower on Thursday, with the Dow Jones finishing nearly unchanged at 41,953.32.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Erase Gains Even As Trump Reiterates 'Crypto Capital' Pledge: Arthur Hayes Says 'Odds Are Shifting More Bullish' For BTC
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies pulled back Thursday despite President Donald Trump's supportive remarks for the industry at an event.

data.title: Apple Stock Down Over 12% This Year — Now Tim Cook Is Reportedly Betting On Vision Pro's Mike Rockwell To Fix Siri After Losing Confidence In AI Boss John Giannandrea
data.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook has reportedly reassigned Vision Pro chief Mike Rockwell to lead Siri, signaling a major AI leadership shake-up after months of delays and a 12% stock decline shook investor confidence.
